Include step numbers, handoff notes, when-to-use for the chain. Support markdown and skill bundle formats.","notes":"Added workflow export functions for markdown + SKILL.md and exported them","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:26:56.937908042-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:28:36.297627268-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:28:36.297630855-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-6xr","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cj1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:39:09.737016555-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-6xs","title":"Configure Vercel deployment (vercel.json)","description":"**Details:** - vercel.json in repository root - Configure build settings for monorepo - Set output directory for Next.js app - Configure rewrites/redirects if needed - Environment variables setup **vercel.json:** ```json { "buildCommand": "cd apps/web && bun run build", "outputDirectory": "apps/web/.next", "installCommand": "bun install", "framework": "nextjs", "rewrites": [ { "source": "/registry.json", "destination": "/api/registry" } ] } ``` **Environment Variables:** - NEXT_PUBLIC_GIT_SHA (set automatically by Vercel) - JFP_REGISTRY_VERSION (build-time) - NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL **Custom Domain:** jeffreysprompts.com **Reasoning:** Vercel deployment config ensures correct monorepo handling. Environment variables enable version tracking and analytics.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:33:26.020138672-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:06:11.906506203-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:06:11.906506203-05:00","close_reason":"vercel.json already configured with framework, buildCommand, installCommand, outputDirectory. Site deploys successfully. Per AGENTS.md, Vercel dashboard has root directory set to apps/web.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-6xs","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r9m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:20.773175581-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-70f8","title":"Task: BM25 search engine unit tests (real tokenization)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:44:27.468117556-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T19:07:15.303286796-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T19:07:15.303286796-05:00","close_reason":"Core package tests already use real implementations (no mocks). 88 tests pass in packages/core.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-70f8","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-yhd","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:54:50.84981627-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} @@ -275,7 +275,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-m61m","title":"Configure security headers and CSP","description":"## Origin Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-vxw. Keep both repos in sync. ## Task Configure security headers and Content Security Policy for production. ## Security Headers ### Required Headers ```typescript // next.config.ts headers { 'X-DNS-Prefetch-Control': 'on', 'Strict-Transport-Security': 'max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload', 'X-Frame-Options': 'SAMEORIGIN', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Referrer-Policy': 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin', 'Permissions-Policy': 'camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()', } ``` ### Content Security Policy ``` default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://js.stripe.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://api.stripe.com; frame-src https://js.stripe.com https://hooks.stripe.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; ``` ### CSP Nonce (for inline scripts) - Generate nonce per request - Apply to script tags - Pass via middleware ## Implementation ### next.config.ts - Add security headers - Configure CSP ### proxy.ts (middleware) - Generate CSP nonce - Add to response headers ### Verification - Security headers scan - CSP validation - No console errors ## Files to Modify - next.config.ts - src/proxy.ts ## Success Criteria - All security headers present - CSP blocks unauthorized sources - No functionality broken - A+ on securityheaders.com ## CSP Hardening Notes - Prefer nonce-based script-src; avoid unsafe-inline/unsafe-eval wherever possible. - Add frame-ancestors 'self' to prevent clickjacking (keeps Stripe frames on frame-src only). - Add report-to or report-uri for CSP violation reporting (route to Sentry or log endpoint). - Include upgrade-insecure-requests and block-all-mixed-content in production. - Validate Supabase, Stripe, and asset domains explicitly (no wildcard unless needed). ","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:24:01.273046908-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T03:18:07.342698693-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-11T03:18:07.342698693-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented security headers including X-DNS-Prefetch-Control, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, and comprehensive CSP with environment-aware settings"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-m7e4","title":"Clean basket entries for removed prompts","description":"Basket could show stale IDs after registry changes; actions/counts mismatched. Auto-prune missing prompt IDs in BasketSidebar.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-10T18:19:18.000476147-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T18:19:53.446241689-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T18:19:53.446241689-05:00","close_reason":"Auto-prune missing prompt IDs when basket prompts list is derived"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-m87","title":"Implement service worker for offline support -- Details: Cache /registry.json, /registry.manifest.json, static assets. Show offline banner when using cached data. SWR-style client fetch to revalidate. Version caches by registry version. Purge old caches on activate.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:26:47.0881234-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T16:51:47.003132327-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T16:51:47.003132327-05:00","close_reason":"Service worker fully implemented in public/service-worker.js with registry caching, offline fallback, and version-based cache purging","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-m87","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-aj2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:21.843866504-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} -{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-maui","title":"Improve basket empty state with engaging design and CTA","description":"# Task: Redesign Basket Empty State ## Current Implementation (BasketSidebar.tsx:200-207) ```tsx

Your basket is empty

Add prompts to export them together

``` ## Problems 1. Generic, not engaging 2. No actionable guidance 3. Doesn't explain the basket's purpose clearly 4. No visual personality (just faded icon) ## Proposed Design ### Enhanced Empty State ```tsx
{/* Illustrated empty state - could be SVG or styled div */}
{/* Decorative sparkle */}

Your basket is empty

Save prompts here to download or install them all at once.

{/* CTA to close sidebar and browse */} {/* Hint text */}

Tip: Swipe right on any prompt card to add it

``` ## Key Improvements 1. **Visual weight**: Larger icon in a container, not floating 2. **Clear value prop**: "download or install them all at once" 3. **Actionable CTA**: "Browse prompts" button closes sidebar 4. **Mobile hint**: Teaches swipe gesture (hidden on desktop) 5. **Visual polish**: Sparkle decoration adds personality ## Mobile-Specific Considerations - Show swipe hint only on mobile (useIsMobile hook) - "Browse prompts" button should close sidebar smoothly ## Design Rationale - Empty states are opportunities to guide users - Explains the "why" of the feature, not just the "what" - Reduces friction by providing next action - Teaches power users about swipe gestures ## Testing 1. Open basket when empty - see new design 2. Click "Browse prompts" - sidebar closes 3. Add an item - empty state disappears 4. Remove all items - empty state returns 5. Check mobile vs desktop hint visibility ## Files Modified - apps/web/src/components/BasketSidebar.tsx ## Dependencies - Uses neutral color palette (should be done after color consistency) - May need to import Search icon from lucide-react","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-12T00:38:45.3629583-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T00:38:45.3629583-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-maui","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-s6ex","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-12T00:43:20.289673405-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-maui","title":"Improve basket empty state with engaging design and CTA","description":"# Task: Redesign Basket Empty State ## Current Implementation (BasketSidebar.tsx:200-207) ```tsx
